de'aaron fox.detail: Played 34 minutes, 21 points, 9 assists in series-clinching win

derrick white.detail: Played 36 minutes but went 0-4 from three in Game 5 loss; right knee contusion noted on subsequent injury report
derrick white.web_narrative: White went 0-for-4 from three-point range in 36 minutes, a cold-shooting performance with no injury exit during the game. A subsequent injury report listed a right knee contusion, but no mid-game departure was indicated.

devin vassell.detail: Played 34 minutes in series-clinching win; went 0-for on 3-pointers but no injury flag
devin vassell.web_narrative: Vassell played a full 34 minutes in the blowout win but failed to connect on any three-point attempts. No injury or other flagged event is reported; the miss appears to be a cold-shooting game.

dylan harper.detail: Played 26 minutes, 17 points, 1 assist in series-clinching win; prior thumb injury noted but no mid-game exit flagged
dylan harper.web_narrative: Harper finished with only 1 assist against a prop of over 2. The Brave search references a prior left thumb injury from the regular-season finale, but no mid-game exit is indicated for this game; the miss appears attributable to limited playmaking opportunities in a blowout with 26 minutes played.

jalen brunson.detail: Played 35 minutes, 39 points in dominant Game 5 win

jalen johnson.detail: Played 35 minutes, 18 points, 10 rebounds, 6 assists in Game 5 loss

jaylen brown.detail: Played 41 minutes, 22 points in Game 5 loss

jayson tatum.detail: Played 41 minutes, 24 points, 16 rebounds, 4 assists in Game 5 loss
jayson tatum.web_narrative: Tatum finished with only 4 assists against a prop of over 6 despite 41 minutes. No injury or external factor is cited; the Celtics trailed for stretches and were outplayed by Embiid, limiting Tatum's facilitation opportunities in the loss.

joel embiid.detail: Played 39 minutes, 33 points in dominant return; returning from appendectomy

og anunoby.detail: Played 35 minutes, 17 points, 10 rebounds in blowout win

payton pritchard.detail: Played 26 minutes in Game 5 loss; no flags noted

stephon castle.detail: Played 33 minutes, 15 points in Game 5 win before fouling out

tyrese maxey.detail: Played 43 minutes, 25 points, 10 rebounds in Game 5 win

victor wembanyama.detail: Played 34 minutes, 17 points, 14 rebounds, 6 blocks in series-clinching win

vj edgecombe.detail: Played 40 minutes in Game 5 win; no flags noted
